Referral Fee Agreement
ESOP Transaction Referral Terms

{{referrerName}}

{{referrerFirm}}
Referred Company
{{companyName}}
Date
{{sentDate}}
§ 01Referral Terms

Dear {{referrerName}},

This letter confirms the referral fee arrangement between Forhemit Transition Stewardship ("Forhemit") and {{referrerFirm}} ("Referrer") for the referral of {{companyName}} to Forhemit's ESOP transaction stewardship services.

{{referralFeeAmount}}
{{feeBasis}}
Closing of the ESOP transaction
Forhemit — from stewardship fee
Within 10 business days of closing
§ 02Conditions
A.Closing required. The referral fee is payable only if the ESOP transaction closes. If the transaction does not close for any reason, no fee is owed.
B.Direct referral. The Referrer must have made a direct, personal introduction to the seller. Cold leads, purchased lists, or indirect referrals do not qualify.
C.No dual compensation. If the Referrer is also the listing broker and receiving a commission under the listing agreement, this referral fee does not apply. The referral fee is for non-broker referrals only.
D.Exclusivity. This referral is non-exclusive. The Referrer is not restricted from referring other ESOP candidates to Forhemit or other firms.
E.Confidentiality. The Referrer agrees to keep all deal information confidential. The existence of the transaction, the company's identity, and the terms may not be disclosed without Forhemit's consent.
§ 03Acceptance

To accept this referral arrangement, please sign below and return to deals@forhemit.com.

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
California Public Benefit Corporation
Authorized Representative

CONFIDENTIAL
This agreement is between Forhemit and the Referrer only.
